name: Blindfold

seo.title: Blindfold - Riddim Software
seo.description: Blindfold is an NFC-powered cannabis game for retail dispensaries.

tagline: An NFC-powered cannabis game that turns product discovery into a memorable retail experience.
homepagePitch: NFC-powered product discovery built for memorable cannabis retail moments.
story: Blindfold helps dispensary teams turn product education into a tactile in-store moment.
features: Designed as a memorable in-store game

name: Bubble Bop

seo.title: Bubble Bop - Riddim Software
seo.description: Bubble Bop is a colourful kids balloon game for iPhone and iPad, available on the App Store.

tagline: A colourful kids balloon game - tap to pop, giggle, and go. Free on iPhone and iPad.
homepagePitch: A bright balloon-popping game for playful iPhone and iPad breaks.
story: Bubble Bop keeps the experience simple: bright balloons, quick taps, and a playful rhythm for young players.

name: Double Dozen

seo.title: Double Dozen - Riddim Software
seo.description: Double Dozen is a tap speed game that tests your reflexes, available on the App Store.

tagline: A tap speed game that tests your reflexes - race to 24 taps and prove you're the fastest.
homepagePitch: A fast reflex challenge for quick, competitive tap-speed sessions.
story: Double Dozen turns a tiny reflex challenge into a quick replayable race against your own speed.

name: epac

seo.title: epac - Riddim Software
seo.description: Verified Canadian government data in your pocket. Free iOS app. All data from official government sources.

tagline: Verified Canadian government data in your pocket - search Hansard, track your MP, and explore lobbying records.
featuredPitch: epac puts verified Canadian government data in your pocket, giving researchers, journalists, civic watchers, and curious citizens a focused way to search Hansard, track MPs, and explore lobbying records without chasing scattered sources. It is built around official datasets, clear paths, and fast answers for public-interest work.
homepagePitch: Verified Canadian government data for faster public-interest research.
story: epac makes official Canadian public data easier to search, follow, and understand from one focused product surface.

name: Portal Door

seo.title: Portal Door - Riddim Software
seo.description: Portal Door turns a doorway into a camera-powered portal interaction for iPhone and iPad.

tagline: Turn a real doorway into a playful portal moment with your iPhone or iPad camera.
homepagePitch: A playful camera-powered doorway interaction for iPhone and iPad.
story: Portal Door uses the camera and Apple's Vision pose detection to watch a doorway frame, then plays a satisfying portal sound when someone walks through.

screenshots.alt: Portal Door camera view showing a detected doorway frame

features: Vision pose tracking for walk-through moments
Designed for quick iPhone and iPad play

name: Reach

seo.title: Reach - Riddim Software
seo.description: Reach helps you stay connected with the people who matter most. Available on the App Store.

tagline: Stay connected with the people who matter most - simple, distraction-free communication for iPhone.
homepagePitch: Simple, distraction-free communication for staying close to important people.
story: Reach focuses on keeping important personal connections close without adding unnecessary noise.
features: Privacy policy available from the product page

name: Sonnio

seo.title: Sonnio - Riddim Software
seo.description: Sonnio is a voice-first music app for Apple Music, Spotify, and Shazam recognition.

homepagePitch: A voice-first music app for playing, recognizing, and switching between Apple Music and Spotify.
storyTitle: A shorter path from hearing a song to playing it.
story: Sonnio gives music a simpler surface: speak a song, choose Apple Music or Spotify, and use Shazam recognition when something nearby catches your ear. The canonical Riddim page keeps the product in the portfolio while sonnio.riddimsoftware.com stays live for the fuller app experience.
featuresIntro: Sonnio keeps the core actions close, plain, and fast.

features.title: Voice control
features.description: Ask for a song out loud and move from idea to playback without digging through menus.

features.title: Apple Music and Spotify
features.description: Connect the services people already use and switch providers when the listening context changes.

features.title: Shazam recognition
features.description: Identify a song you hear nearby, then keep it moving into your listening flow.

features.title: Riddim support path
features.description: The Sonnio subdomain remains live, and support stays reachable through Riddim.

screenshotsIntro: Three App Store screenshots show the voice-first flow, provider controls, and recognition surface.

screenshots.alt: Sonnio music provider and playback screen
